response.justification: Exceptional match on core full-stack experience (19 years, 6+ in senior roles), AI agent development, and primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB). MIT CS degree plus proven TDD culture and engineering excellence. Minor gaps are framework-specific (Nest.js not mentioned, Vitest/Playwright not listed) rather than foundational—easily addressed in interview given demonstrated Node.js and testing expertise.
strengths: AI agent development and MCP infrastructure expertise directly aligns with emerging role needs; current staff engineer role demonstrates seniority and leadership capability
Strong primary stack match: TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS CDK, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes all explicitly demonstrated across recent roles
Proven testing and TDD discipline; organized code kata sessions, created testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and mentored through workshops—indicates deep quality culture
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned; while Node.js expertise is deep, the specific framework required is not demonstrated on resume
Modern testing framework specifics missing: Vitest and Playwright not listed, though general testing excellence is evident
Secondary tech gaps: Python not mentioned, Kotlin/Java experience appears dated (2016-2018), GCP/Azure not demonstrated (AWS only)

key_factors.factor: MIT degree + 19 years experience in role level
